data.content: Plan approved: replace the knots rollback command in rollbackBeatState with the dedicated kno rollback/rb command, keep the best-effort note, leave the beads path unchanged, and add a unit test at the memory-manager-commands layer because the terminal-manager tests only cover the call site. No invariant, security, performance, or maintainability issues found; CLI 0.7.6 exposes rollback and accepts rb as an alias.
